title: Mercimek Corbasi (Turkish Red Lentil Soup)
description: A traditional Turkish soup made with red lentils, onions, garlic, and spices. It's a hearty and comforting meal that's perfect for a cold day.

ingredients.name: Turkish Corbasi Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at Middle Eastern grocery stores

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Vegetable or chicken broth can be used for added flavor

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped carrot and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cumin, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the red lentils, corbasi spice mix, and water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
